name: Staff of Sliske
hoverSummary: Tier 92 two-handed magic staff with 1324.8 ability damage and 2577 accuracy.
detailLines: Two-handed magic weapon with 6-tick speed and range 8.
Live special attack: From the Shadows.
Examine: An imitation of the Staff of Armadyl, designed by Sliske.
implementationNotes: Curated magic 2h staff from the live Staff of Sliske page. Wiki-verified with Playwright for tier, damage, accuracy, speed, and special attack presence.
